summary_html: Focus and concentration commonly decline after 40 due to estrogen-related acetylcholine drops, falling NAD+ levels, and sleep disruption. This guide covers the most effective evidence-based strategies including sleep, exercise, nutrition, and targeted supplements, plus the morning routine that sets up optimal brain performance.
seo_title: How to Improve Focus After 40: Evidence-Based Strategies That Work
seo_description: Learn why focus and concentration decline after 40 and what actually helps. Evidence-based strategies for brain fog, memory, and sustained attention for women.
